FanosCoin is a community-led movement dedicated to making education and opportunities accessible to everyone — expanding the BSC ecosystem across East Africa, focusing on real adoption. At the center of this mission is FanosCoin.

Who we are

Built by the community,
for everyone who aspires
to be a builder.

Fanos Community started contributing to Giggle Academy since its inception. The community deeply believes in the idea of equal opportunity for anyone — hence why we are working to democratize access to education across Africa.

We are ranked the #1 contributor in Giggle Academy, have brought more than 4,000+ parents and kids, visited over 15+ schools, with a total of 30,000+ kids reached throughout the year.

Our goal is to bring millions of underserved students to Giggle Academy by 2027.

How it works

Three ways to win
with $FANOS

01

Buy & Hold

Purchase $FANOS on PancakeSwap with BNB. Holding gives you access to the course, bingo game, and all future ecosystem features.

02

Learn & Earn

Complete the 6-module BSC development course. Pass quizzes, track progress on-chain, and earn a verifiable certificate on completion.

03

Play & Win

Join live multiplayer bingo games. Winners get paid instantly via smart contract — no middleman, no delays, just $FANOS in your wallet.

How to Buy

Get $FANOS
in four steps.

1

Get MetaMask

Install MetaMask and add BNB Smart Chain network (Chain ID: 56)

2

Buy BNB

Purchase BNB from any exchange and send it to your MetaMask wallet

3

Go to PancakeSwap

Visit pancakeswap.finance and connect your wallet

4

Swap for $FANOS

Paste the contract address and swap BNB for $FANOS
